step.name: gather
step.input: Invoices + payroll + contractor invoices + fixed-cost log + time-tracking
step.action: Pull all monthly data into the close worksheet.

step.name: classify
step.action: Split revenue into 3 lines; classify contractor under COGS; payroll under OpEx.

step.name: utilisation
step.action: Compute billable / available rate; record per-FTE breakdown.

step.name: variance
step.action: Compute revenue variance vs plan + reason.

step.name: publish
step.action: Commit to repo; share with partners.
